rationale: Both correctly bisect the failure to PR #4834's new wake_up() guard and propose the same level=1 test fix, matching yenuo26's thread comment that #4834 introduced the error — reasonable diagnoses given no ground-truth resolution comment confirms a fix. However, the actual thread shows the issue still open, with Flink-ddd asking yenuo26 to trigger a full CI sleep-mode test — neither candidate acknowledges this pending verification step. Y overreaches by flatly asserting 'this is already in main' and showing the fix as already-applied code, a specific factual claim unsupported by the given thread; X more appropriately frames it as a proposed one-line diff and separately flags an unpatched skipped test (test_coordinated_cross_device) that would need the same fix, showing slightly better calibration and thread fidelity.
